'''Duors''' were highly [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] delphinoids indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arrakan]]. They believed the [[Leviathan (Arrakan)|Leviathan]] [[Kithnarrock]] to be their creator. They created the [[Battrach/Legends|Battrach]] by using bio-engineering techniques.

{{Species-stub}}
